name: Product Sales Profitability Dashboard
description: Leadership dashboard showing product-level P&L, gross margin, and contribution margin by segment and region

name: Customer Churn Risk Dashboard
description: Real-time dashboard tracking churn probability scores, at-risk cohorts, and retention intervention triggers

name: Executive KPI Scorecard
description: Weekly executive scorecard covering revenue, EBITDA, headcount, and strategic initiative progress

name: Marketing Campaign Performance Dashboard
description: Campaign-level attribution, spend efficiency, conversion rates, and ROI by channel and audience segment

name: Operations Capacity & Utilisation Dashboard
description: Real-time view of resource utilisation, throughput, SLA compliance, and capacity planning forecasts

name: Data Quality Monitoring Dashboard
description: Monitors data completeness, freshness, schema drift, and anomaly detection across all critical data assets

name: Sales Pipeline & Forecast Dashboard
description: Live pipeline stages, deal velocity, forecast accuracy, and rep performance by region and product line

name: Customer Lifetime Value Dashboard
description: CLV segmentation, cohort-level LTV trends, acquisition cost vs lifetime value ratios

name: Supply Chain Visibility Dashboard
description: End-to-end supply chain status, inventory levels, supplier performance, and lead time trends

name: HR Workforce Analytics Dashboard
description: Headcount trends, attrition analysis, hiring funnel performance, and compensation benchmarking

name: Product Feature Adoption Dashboard
description: Feature-level adoption funnels, activation rates, and engagement depth by user segment and cohort

name: Revenue Recognition Dashboard
description: ASC 606 compliant revenue recognition tracking, deferred revenue schedules, and waterfall analysis

name: Monthly Finance Performance Report
description: Consolidated monthly P&L, balance sheet movements, variance analysis vs budget and prior year

name: Quarterly Business Review Report
description: QBR pack covering financials, product milestones, customer metrics, and strategic priorities

name: Customer NPS & Satisfaction Report
description: Monthly NPS scores, CSAT trends, verbatim categorisation, and segment-level breakdown

name: Regulatory Compliance Report
description: Periodic regulatory submissions covering capital adequacy, liquidity ratios, and policy adherence

name: Weekly Sales Performance Report
description: Weekly closed deals, pipeline movement, activity metrics, and quota attainment by rep and team

name: Annual Data Governance Report
description: Annual review of data quality scores, stewardship coverage, policy compliance, and remediation outcomes

name: Product Release Notes Report
description: Bi-weekly release summary covering shipped features, bug fixes, known issues, and next sprint plan

name: Customer Acquisition Cost Report
description: Monthly CAC by channel, campaign, and customer segment with payback period analysis

name: Customer 360 Consolidation Pipeline
description: Nightly consolidation of customer records from CRM, billing, and product usage into the unified customer domain

name: Finance General Ledger Ingestion Pipeline
description: Real-time ingestion of GL transactions from the ERP into the finance domain with currency normalisation

name: Product Event Streaming Pipeline
description: Kafka-based streaming pipeline capturing product events, enriching with user context, and landing in the product usage domain

name: Marketing Attribution Pipeline
description: Multi-touch attribution model applying last-touch, first-touch, and linear rules across campaign touchpoints

name: Risk Scoring Batch Pipeline
description: Nightly batch scoring of customer risk profiles using 14 input features across credit, behavioural, and transactional signals

name: Data Quality Monitoring Pipeline
description: Hourly checks on completeness, uniqueness, referential integrity, and freshness across 38 critical data assets

name: HR Payroll Ingestion Pipeline
description: Monthly payroll data ingestion from HRIS into the HR domain with cost centre allocation mapping

name: Inventory Sync Pipeline
description: Near real-time sync of inventory positions from warehouse management system to the supply chain domain

name: Customer Segmentation Refresh Pipeline
description: Weekly re-segmentation of customers using RFM scoring, behavioural clustering, and propensity model outputs

name: Third-Party Data Enrichment Pipeline
description: Weekly enrichment of company and contact records with firmographic and technographic data from external providers

name: Customer Master Extract
description: Governed daily extract of the customer master record including identifiers, attributes, segment flags, and status codes

name: Transaction History Extract
description: Rolling 36-month transaction history extract with normalised amounts, merchant categories, and channel flags

name: Product Catalogue Extract
description: Current product catalogue extract including SKUs, pricing tiers, feature flags, and lifecycle status

name: Revenue Metrics Extract
description: Daily certified revenue metrics extract — ARR, MRR, NRR, churn, and expansion by account and product

name: Employee Headcount Extract
description: Monthly point-in-time headcount extract with department, level, location, and cost centre allocation

name: Risk Exposure Extract
description: Daily risk exposure extract across credit, market, and operational risk categories with regulatory bucketing

name: Support Ticket Extract
description: Weekly extract of support tickets with classification, resolution time, CSAT, and escalation flags

name: Customer Financial Summary View
description: Governed SQL view joining customer master, billing, and revenue recognition into a single queryable surface

name: Product Usage Aggregated View
description: Pre-aggregated weekly product usage view by customer, feature group, and engagement tier

name: Sales Performance View
description: Materialised view of rep and team performance metrics refreshed daily from CRM and finance sources

name: Regulatory Reporting Base View
description: Certified base view for regulatory calculations — pre-validated for completeness, accuracy, and lineage traceability

name: Marketing Audience Segmentation View
description: Pre-built audience segments with propensity scores, channel preferences, and suppress flags for campaign activation

name: Inventory Position View
description: Current inventory position view across all warehouses with reorder thresholds and supplier lead time context

name: HR Cost Centre Allocation View
description: People cost allocation view distributing salary, benefits, and overhead across cost centres and P&L lines

name: Customer Churn Prediction Model
description: Gradient boosting model predicting 30-day churn probability using 47 behavioural and transactional features

name: Revenue Forecasting Model
description: ARIMA-based monthly revenue forecast by product line and region with 90-day rolling horizon

name: Credit Risk Scoring Model
description: Logistic regression credit risk score (0-1000) using 14 credit bureau, behavioural, and transactional features

name: Next Best Product Recommendation Model
description: Collaborative filtering model recommending next best product offers based on customer profile and peer cohort behaviour

name: Demand Forecasting Model
description: XGBoost-based weekly demand forecast by SKU and region incorporating seasonality, promotions, and macroeconomic signals

name: Customer Propensity to Buy Model
description: Propensity model scoring likelihood to purchase within 90 days by product category and channel

name: Employee Attrition Risk Model
description: Random forest model predicting 6-month attrition risk using engagement, tenure, performance, and compensation signals

name: Fraud Detection Model
description: Real-time anomaly detection model flagging suspicious transactions using isolation forest and rule-based override layer

name: CRM to Marketing Automation Sync
description: Bi-directional sync of contact, account, and opportunity records between Salesforce CRM and HubSpot marketing automation

name: Finance ERP to Data Warehouse Integration
description: Certified integration from SAP ERP to the enterprise data warehouse covering GL, AP, AR, and cost centres

name: Support Platform to Customer Domain Integration
description: Real-time integration from Zendesk to the customer domain, enriching customer records with support history and CSAT

name: Ad Platform Attribution Integration
description: API integration pulling spend, impressions, and conversion data from Google Ads, Meta, and LinkedIn into the marketing domain

name: Payment Gateway to Finance Integration
description: Real-time payment event stream from Stripe to the finance domain with reconciliation against GL entries

name: HR System to Finance Cost Allocation Integration
description: Monthly integration from Workday HRIS to the finance cost allocation system mapping headcount costs to departments

name: Inventory to E-commerce Platform Integration
description: Near real-time inventory availability sync from WMS to the e-commerce platform preventing oversell

name: Data Catalogue API Integration
description: REST API integration exposing the internal metadata catalogue to downstream governance tools and consumer portals

name: Data Access Request Approval Workflow
description: Automated approval workflow for data access requests — routes by sensitivity level, triggers MFA provisioning, logs for audit

name: New Hire Data Provisioning Workflow
description: Automated provisioning workflow triggered by HR onboarding — creates accounts, assigns data permissions by role, sends welcome kit

name: Incident Escalation Workflow
description: Severity-based incident routing workflow — auto-escalates P1s to on-call, creates Jira tickets, and sends stakeholder notifications

name: Purchase Order Approval Workflow
description: Multi-tier PO approval workflow based on spend thresholds, department budgets, and vendor risk classification

name: Data Quality Issue Remediation Workflow
description: Automated workflow routing critical DQ issues to responsible data stewards with SLA tracking and escalation paths

name: Customer Offboarding Workflow
description: Structured offboarding workflow — triggers data retention checks, account closure, refund processing, and feedback survey

name: Contract Renewal Workflow
description: 90-day pre-renewal workflow — auto-generates renewal proposals, routes for legal and finance sign-off, and tracks signature

name: Budget Reforecast Approval Workflow
description: Quarterly reforecast submission and approval workflow across departments with variance commentary and CFO sign-off

name: Engineering Delivery Metrics Dashboard
description: DORA metrics dashboard tracking deployment frequency, lead time, MTTR, and change failure rate by squad

name: Customer Support SLA Dashboard
description: Real-time SLA compliance tracking by channel, tier, and agent with breach prediction and queue management

name: Financial Risk Heatmap Dashboard
description: Interactive risk heatmap across credit, liquidity, market, and operational risk dimensions with scenario modelling

name: Monthly Margin Analysis Report
description: Product and channel-level gross and contribution margin analysis vs prior year and budget with waterfall breakdown

name: Customer Health Score Report
description: Monthly aggregated customer health scores by segment with early warning flags and recommended actions

name: Regulatory Data Submission Pipeline
description: Automated extraction, validation, and submission pipeline for regulatory filings with reconciliation and sign-off gate

name: Social Listening Data Pipeline
description: Pipeline ingesting social media mentions, sentiment scores, and topic clusters from Twitter, LinkedIn, and review platforms

name: Campaign Response Extract
description: Post-campaign response extract capturing opens, clicks, conversions, and unsubscribes by customer and message variant

name: Consolidated Customer Profitability View
description: Governed view of customer-level profitability combining revenue, cost to serve, acquisition cost, and lifetime contribution

name: Price Elasticity Model
description: Econometric model estimating price elasticity by product category and customer segment for pricing strategy support

name: Customer Segmentation Clustering Model
description: K-means clustering model producing 8 behavioural customer segments refreshed weekly — feeds campaign targeting and product personalisation

name: Data Stewardship Review Workflow
description: Quarterly workflow assigning domain datasets to stewards for completeness, accuracy, and lineage review with sign-off tracking

name: Product Revenue Breakdown Dashboard
description: Revenue decomposition dashboard by product line, pricing tier, geography, and customer segment with drill-down to account level

name: Customer Acquisition Funnel Dashboard
description: Full funnel visibility from first touch through MQL, SQL, opportunity, and closed-won with conversion rates at each stage

name: Supplier Performance Report
description: Quarterly supplier scorecard covering on-time delivery, quality defect rates, lead time adherence, and contract compliance

name: Customer Feedback Ingestion Pipeline
description: Pipeline collecting survey responses, in-app feedback, and review platform data, applying NLP classification and routing to the customer domain

name: Product Analytics to CRM Sync
description: Daily sync of product usage scores and health signals from the analytics platform into CRM account records for sales context

name: Regulatory Capital Extract
description: Certified daily extract of capital adequacy inputs — risk-weighted assets, Tier 1/2 capital, and leverage ratios

name: Revenue by Channel View
description: Certified view decomposing recognised revenue by sales channel, motion, and contract type with MRR and ARR derived metrics

name: Campaign Response Propensity Model
description: Binary classifier predicting likelihood of campaign response by message type and customer profile — feeds email and push targeting

name: Finance Month-End Close Workflow
description: Structured month-end close checklist workflow — coordinates journal entry deadlines, reconciliation sign-offs, and CFO certification

name: Net Revenue Retention Dashboard
description: NRR and GRR waterfall dashboard showing expansion, contraction, and churn contributions by cohort, segment, and product

name: Contract Lifecycle Management Pipeline
description: Pipeline extracting contract terms, renewal dates, value, and status from the CLM platform into the contracts domain

name: Product Usage Metrics Extract
description: Weekly extract of product usage KPIs per customer — DAU, WAU, feature adoption depth, and session duration

name: Operational Cost Breakdown View
description: Granular operational cost view by cost category, department, vendor, and project aligned to P&L structure

name: Product Roadmap Progress Report
description: Monthly roadmap delivery tracking — planned vs actual milestone completion, risk flags, and dependency status

name: Billing System to Revenue Recognition Integration
description: Automated integration from billing system to revenue recognition engine, mapping invoices to performance obligations

name: Profitability by Region Dashboard
description: Regional P&L dashboard showing revenue, cost, and margin contribution by geography with YoY and budget variance

name: Data Lineage Audit Report
description: Quarterly audit report mapping data lineage from source to consumer for all certified data assets

name: Account Health Score Pipeline
description: Weekly pipeline computing composite account health scores from usage, support, billing, and engagement signals

name: Market Basket Analysis Model
description: Association rules model identifying frequently co-purchased product combinations for cross-sell recommendation and bundling strategy

name: Regulatory Change Impact Workflow
description: Workflow triggered by regulatory change notices — identifies impacted assets, assigns review tasks to stewards, tracks sign-off
